system.description:
Blade Rush is the Striker discipline for the runners who never wanted to be in the breach team. They wanted to be the runner who came in afterward, with a short, brutal weapon, while the team was still busy with their primary loadout. Practitioners pair a folding blade or close-combat tool with a sidearm and a refined sense of when to swap between the two.

On the job, the Blade Rush Striker is the close-quarters answer to overlapping firing arcs. Their entry feature is Sidearm Pivot: in any round they hit with a melee attack, they may make an additional sidearm attack at no penalty against a different target within short range.
system.grants: Sidearm Pivot: melee hits trigger a no-penalty sidearm attack against a different short-range target.

wizard.tagline: Run the blade, the pistol, and the gap in between
